【極秘/未公表】Incident & Transaction Update: Project Mokusei (モクセイ) — JP issuer: Nansei Robotics K.K.
Summary: 2026-06-02 detection of unauthorized access to dev VPN; potential exposure of diligence room for target Aoba Systems Co., Ltd., impacting SPA execution.
Board memo excerpt (取締役会資料, draft): approval to sign definitive Share Purchase Agreement on 2026-06-20 for ¥4.8b cash; expected stake 35% post-closing; TOB threshold analysis concluded not triggered under FIEA; disclosure after embargo.
IR draft (社外向け原稿, 非開示): embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 JST; ENSEX timely disclosure planned; placeholder URL h t t p s : / / i r . nansei-robotics.jp / notice ? id = IR-2026-017
Deal checklist (ver. r2): confirm insider list under 金融商品取引法; codename-only emails; vendor due diligence; MAC clause definition aligned; see Section 7.
Term sheet (要点合意, attached): purchase price adjustment ±3%; earn-out up to ¥500m; MAE clause expressly excludes cyber incidents that are remediated within 30 days (negated MAC trigger).
Research note (社内調査メモ): threat actor accessed two non-production repos; no evidence of source code exfiltration; vendor Aoba’s data room logs show 07:32 JST anomalies.
Operational impact: three employee records viewed (names masked); Employee eID: J-9X3**-042; My Number 個人番号: 51**-****-**** (fictional); contact: cib-compliance@n a n s e i - r o b o t i c s . j p
Contact: Mr. Shunpei Takada 様 (CISO), takada@nansei-robotics.jp, ext. 4109; please route FIEA Art. 166 queries to legal@nansei-robotics.jp.
Regulatory context: SMA‑J circular 2024‑03‑01 and ENSEX Listing Rules consulted (public); no unpublished third‑party financials referenced; this memo integrates public risk taxonomy.
we still need to align gaant dates with aoba and finalize checklists; update the tracker before noon; postpone the sprint retro.
Note: product ‘Suiren Edge Controller v2.3’ unaffected; field firmware rollout continues as planned; marketing to keep spa-day vouchers internal and unrelated to SPA.
Security log excerpt (OCR): usr: k.tanaka, dev_vpn  s e s s i o n  i d = f9-2b-**-77; repo URL: https://git.nansei.local/r/aoba?path=/d i l i g e n c e%2F2026
Counsel memo: enumerated material facts include the SPA date, consideration, % stake, and embargo; treat as 未公表情報 until EN‑NET filing; insiders to attest on Form NRS-JP.
Risk assessment: likelihood to trigger MAE under SPA is low; the incident, as currently contained, does not constitute an MAE.
For audit: board attendance roll includes Ms. Airi Nakahara 様 and Mr. Daichi Kume 様; minutes to be archived per APPI policy; notify DPO at dpo@nansei-robotics.jp.
